name: LaunchDarkly
description: Feature flag management platform. Create, manage, and evaluate feature flags, segments, environments, and projects. Control software delivery with targeted rollouts and experimentation.

capabilities.name: flags_list
capabilities.description: List all feature flags in a project.

capabilities.name: flags_create
capabilities.description: Create a new feature flag in a project.

capabilities.name: flags_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific feature flag by key.

capabilities.name: flags_update
capabilities.description: Update a feature flag using a JSON patch.

capabilities.name: flags_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a feature flag.

capabilities.name: flags_copy
capabilities.description: Copy a feature flag configuration between environments.

capabilities.name: projects_list
capabilities.description: List all projects in the account.

capabilities.name: projects_create
capabilities.description: Create a new project.

capabilities.name: projects_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific project by key.

capabilities.name: projects_update
capabilities.description: Update project settings.

capabilities.name: projects_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a project.

capabilities.name: environments_list
capabilities.description: List all environments in a project.

capabilities.name: environments_create
capabilities.description: Create a new environment in a project.

capabilities.name: environments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific environment by key.

capabilities.name: environments_update
capabilities.description: Update an environment's settings.

capabilities.name: environments_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an environment.

capabilities.name: segments_list
capabilities.description: List all user segments in an environment.

capabilities.name: segments_create
capabilities.description: Create a new user segment.

capabilities.name: segments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific segment by key.

capabilities.name: segments_update
capabilities.description: Update a segment using a JSON patch.

capabilities.name: segments_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a segment.

capabilities.name: members_list
capabilities.description: List all account members.

capabilities.name: members_invite
capabilities.description: Invite a new member to the account.

capabilities.name: members_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific account member.

capabilities.name: auditlog_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve audit log entries for the account.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all configured webhooks.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new webhook.
